title: eXITe Computers: Your Local Partner in Smart IT Solutions
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Experts in Home and Business...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Experts in Home and Business IT Solutions, eXITe Computers of Mossel Bay, has once again received multiple nominations for the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Experts in Home and Business IT Solutions, eXITe Computers of Mossel Bay, has once again received multiple nominations for the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Specialising in a wide range professional IT products and services, eXITe Computers has been nominated the BEST IN TOWN by Mossel Bay residents in the following categories: Best Internet Service Provider, Best IT Support Services and Best Computer/Electronic Store."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Situated at 26 Industry Road, Voorbaai, eXITe Computers offers competitive, cost-effective solutions, reliable service and support for business and home users throughout the Garden Route and surrounding areas.","html":"Situated at 26 Industry Road, Voorbaai, eXITe Computers offers competitive, cost-effective solutions, reliable service and support for business and home users throughout the Garden Route and surrounding areas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The company does board-level laptop and PC repairs, network and Wi-Fi setup, IT support and maintenance, cybersecurity and data protection, custom software and web development, CCTV installation, VoIP solutions for crystal-clear business communication and fast, reliable internet connectivity.","html":"The company does board-level laptop and PC repairs, network and Wi-Fi setup, IT support and maintenance, cybersecurity and data protection, custom software and web development, CCTV installation, VoIP solutions for crystal-clear business communication and fast, reliable internet connectivity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"eXITe has more than 20 years of certified experience and success. But eXITe is more than just a technology service provider.","html":"eXITe has more than 20 years of certified experience and success. But eXITe is more than just a technology service provider."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We’re your local solution provider, your advocate and your partner in mastering the computer world. Like a dedicated hero, we tackle your toughest IT challenges head-on, ignite innovation and deliver smart solutions that empower your business to excel. We go the extra mile, because your success is our mission.”","html":"“We’re your local solution provider, your advocate and your partner in mastering the computer world. Like a dedicated hero, we tackle your toughest IT challenges head-on, ignite innovation and deliver smart solutions that empower your business to excel. We go the extra mile, because your success is our mission.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"eXITe Computers has been nominated for the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards for a second year.","html":"eXITe Computers has been nominated for the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards for a second year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Find out more about the services eXITe Computers offers and how they can support you by visiting www.exite.co.za, or follow them on Facebook at Exite Computers.","html":"Find out more about the services eXITe Computers offers and how they can support you by visiting www.exite.co.za, or follow them on Facebook at Exite Computers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vote for eXITe Computers at: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/","html":"Vote for eXITe Computers at: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your one-stop IT shop.","html":"Your one-stop IT shop."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
